name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-3b3a
description: E5 Phase 7d Step 9 — enables 3B per-brick safety + 3A DDA step cap. Both are cheap (1 brickMeta lookup + arithmetic for 3B; pure arithmetic for 3A). Pipeline rebuilds with both override constants enabled (~10-15s). Verifies the cheap end of Step 9 fits the tile=1 budget without going over TDR. D1 + D5 (heavier) parked separately like Step 6/7.
